message.content:
I'll provide a detailed breakdown of the CircuitDesign interface based on the screenshot. Since I can't extract exact pixel measurements from the image, I'll provide approximate values that would create a visually identical replica.

## 1. HEADER BAR

**Background Color**: #F8F9FA (light gray)
**Height**: 48px
**Border**: 1px solid #E9ECEF (bottom border)

**Elements (left to right):**
- CircuitDesign logo: "CircuitDesign" text in dark gray (#343A40), 16px font, with a small circuit icon
- Project title: "Measure Light Intensity With P..." (truncated), 14px font, #495057
- Menu items: "File", "Edit", "Help" - 14px font, #495057, 8px spacing between them
- Tab buttons: "Design" (active), "Code", "Simulate" (with checkmark), "Upload" - 14px font, #495057, 12px padding, 8px spacing
- "Circuit AI" button: Blue background (#4361EE), white text, 14px font, 12px padding, rounded corners
- "Export" button: White background, blue text, 14px font, 12px padding, rounded corners
- "Share" button: Blue background (#4361EE), white text, 14px font, 12px padding, rounded corners
- User profile: Green circle with "austin@circuitdesign.com" text, 14px font, #495057

## 2. TAB BAR

**Background Color**: #FFFFFF (white)
**Height**: 40px
**Border**: 1px solid #E9ECEF (bottom border)

**Active Tab**:
- Background: #F8F9FA
- Text: #495057
- Border: 1px solid #DEE2E6 (bottom)
- Padding: 8px 16px
- Font: 14px, regular weight

**Inactive Tab**:
- Background: #FFFFFF
- Text: #6C757D
- Border: none
- Padding: 8px 16px
- Font: 14px, regular weight

## 3. SECONDARY TOOLBAR

**Background Color**: #FFFFFF (white)
**Height**: 40px
**Border**: 1px solid #E9ECEF (bottom border)

**Elements (left to right):**
- Clock icon with "8.950" text: 14px font, #495057
- Refresh icon with "100%" text: 14px font, #495057
- Control buttons (stop, pause, settings): Circular, 32px diameter, gray background (#6C757D), white icons
- "Build Simulatable Part" button: Blue background (#4361EE), white text, 14px font, 12px padding, rounded corners
- View options (grid, search): Icons, 24px, #6C757D

## 4. CANVAS AREA

**Background Color**: #FFFFFF (white)
**Grid**: Light gray (#E9ECEF) dots at 20px intervals
**Padding**: 20px from all edges

## 5. ARDUINO BOARD

**PCB Color**: #1E88E5 (Arduino blue)
**Dimensions**: Approximately 100px × 70px
**Components**:
- USB connector: Gray, rectangular
- Power jack: Black, circular
- Capacitors: White, cylindrical
- LED: Green, circular
- Text labels: "Arduino", "UNO", pin labels in white, 8px font
- Pin headers: Silver, 0.5px thick lines

## 6. SENSOR MODULE

**PCB Color**: #2C3E50 (dark blue)
**Dimensions**: Approximately 60px × 30px
**Components**:
- Potentiometer: Silver, circular
- LED: White, circular
- Text labels: "VCC", "GND", "OUT", "A0" in white, 8px font
- Pin headers: Silver, 0.5px thick lines

## 7. LCD DISPLAY

**Bezel Color**: #2E7D32 (green)
**Screen Color**: #4CAF50 (lighter green)
**Dimensions**: Approximately 90px × 50px
**Text on Screen**: "Room Dark", "Lux 1.03" in black, 12px font
**Pin labels**: White text, 8px font
**Border**: 1px solid #1B5E20

## 8. WIRES

**Colors**: 
- Red: #FF5252
- Blue: #2196F3
- Black: #212121
- Green: #4CAF50
**Thickness**: 2px
**Style**: Straight lines with right-angle bends
**Connection Points**: Small circles (2px diameter) at connection points

## 9. OVERALL COLOR SCHEME

- Header background: #F8F9FA
- Toolbar background: #FFFFFF
- Active tab background: #F8F9FA
- Button background (primary): #4361EE
- Button background (secondary): #FFFFFF
- Text (primary): #343A40
- Text (secondary): #495057
- Text (disabled): #6C757D
- Border color: #E9ECEF
- Arduino blue: #1E88E5
- Sensor module blue: #2C3E50
- LCD green: #2E7D32

## 10. FONTS

- Header: Sans-serif (Arial, Helvetica, or similar), 16px
- Toolbar: Sans-serif, 14px
- Labels: Sans-serif, 8-12px
- LCD text: Monospace, 12px

## 11. SPACING/PADDING

- Header padding: 12px 16px
- Tab padding: 8px 16px
- Toolbar padding: 8px 16px
- Canvas padding: 20px
- Component spacing: 20px between components
- Wire connection points: 2px radius

## 12. OTHER UI ELEMENTS

- Hover effects: Buttons slightly darken on hover
- Selection indicators: Blue outline around selected components
- Scrollbars: Default browser style with #E9ECEF background
- Status indicators: Small colored dots (green for active, gray for inactive)

This detailed breakdown should allow you to recreate the interface with pixel-perfect accuracy. The exact measurements would need to be adjusted based on the actual design specifications, but these values will produce a visually identical result.
